query:
-- Age distribution of manual contacts
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN createdAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 YEAR) THEN '2+ years old'
    WHEN createdAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) THEN '1-2 years old'
    WHEN createdAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) THEN '6-12 months old'
    WHEN createdAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH) THEN '3-6 months old'
    ELSE 'Under 3 months'
  END as age_bucket,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts
WHERE enrichmentSource = 'manual' AND contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
GROUP BY age_bucket ORDER BY count DESC;

-- Age distribution of manual contacts
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN createdAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 YEAR) THEN '2+ years old'
    WHEN createdAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) THEN '1-2 years old'
    WHEN createdAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) THEN '6-12 months old'
    WHEN createdAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH) THEN '3-6 months old'
    ELSE 'Under 3 months'
  END as age_bucket,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts
WHERE enrichmentSource = 'manual' AND contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
GROUP BY age_bucket ORDER BY count DESC;
